blockers: example.com is an IANA-reserved documentation domain, not a commercial storefront.
The site offers no product or service for sale.
No price, commercial terms, checkout, provisioning flow, purchase API, or programmatic payment mechanism was found.
Human-gate status cannot be established because no purchase path exists.
trust_events: The site explicitly says to avoid using it in operations; IANA states its example-domain web service is not designed for production applications.
notes: Read-only inspection of the site, its sole IANA link, and web results found only a basic informational page explaining the reserved domain's documentation purpose. The directive cannot be completed end-to-end because there is nothing purchasable.
